challenge.title: Korak 3
challenge.description:
Zatim, uklonite ključnu reč pass unutar klase Node, zatim dodelite klasi Node metod __init__ sa dva parametra, self i element.

Unutar metode, dodelite element na self.element. Ovo skladišti vrednost koja se prosleđuje prilikom kreiranja čvora.

tests.text: You should define an __init__ method inside your Node class.
Your __init__ method should have two parameters, self and element.
You should assign element to self.element inside the __init__ method.

challengeFiles.name: main
